changes.summary: Export continues when resource map building produces warnings only; those warnings are returned with the export result instead of stopping map retrieval early.
When the export filter matches no valid resource types, the resulting error may include warnings collected during map building rather than only a single no-valid-resource-types message.
The message Building sanitized resource maps is written to standard console output during export.

related_export_changes.summary: Exported flow configurations may differ because per-attribute filepath variable resolution during sanitization was removed.
Flow exports no longer apply a post-write instance state attribute update that previously ran during flow export.
